title: Transit Walkshed Isochrones
summary: Estimate reachable jobs from each stop in a local walk network and visualize access differences.
description: A mobility notebook with local graph data, Dijkstra travel times, access scoring, and interactive network mapping.

datasets.name: Primary local dataset
datasets.description: Bundled inputs used by the notebook without external downloads.

steps: Open main.ipynb in the recommended runtime image.
Load the local data from the data/ directory and inspect schema or metadata.
Run the analysis cells to compute indicators or model diagnostics.
Review static plots and interactive HTML/map outputs written to outputs/.
Use the printed ranking or summary table as the case conclusion.
expectedResults: A reproducible notebook with local data loading and no external data dependency.
At least one exploratory table and one geospatial or analytical visualization.
Outputs saved under outputs/ for inspection after running the notebook.
